summary.lv: Tietoevry Banking meklē Scrum Master Rīgas/Liepājas komandai, kas vada Agile/SAFe procesus, novērš šķēršļus, koordinē ar Release Train Engineers un palīdz attīstīt high-performance banku programmatūras komandu.
summary.en: Tietoevry Banking is hiring a Scrum Master for its Riga/Liepāja team to lead Agile/SAFe ceremonies, remove impediments, coordinate with Release Train Engineers and grow a high-performance banking software team.
